highlights: Lead architecture and development of a multitenant SaaS platform for broker-dealers, compliance, and reporting — treasury and fiscal operations, healthcare, logistics, capital markets, credit risk, stock, billing, and omnichannel workflows across 100+ repositories on Azure.
Go microservice backends follow hexagonal architecture; Alycs is a monolithic Go backend with a separate Next.js frontend integrating Estudio Gallo, BYMA, and Primary APIs.

Domain modeling and integrations: Auth (tenants, invites, RBAC/ABAC), Core entity registry, Tesorería (AR/AP, Interbanking, ARCA invoicing sync), Salud, Booking, Stock, Omnicanal (AI + MCP), Préstamos, Cars, Logística, and related services.
Platform patterns: row-level multitenancy, event sourcing on selected services, outbox for Omnicanal async delivery to Meta APIs, and internal M2M SDKs for service communication and security.
Observability and production: structured logs, Jaeger error tracing and latency sampling, code reviews, schema migrations, and Azure log triage.
Led Vertis: digital and radio advertisement sales — operational workflows, functional analysis, UX/UI, and full product delivery.
Built Sentinel: service that ingests ISP abuse-report emails and applies penalties and filters to illegal network traffic.
Backoffice systems with PHP, Laravel, MySQL, and JavaScript; promoted to Lead Developer in May 2023.

Operational and business management before transitioning to software engineering: accounting workflows, customer and supplier operations, payroll and tax compliance, production and accounting statistics.
Defined software requirements and optimized data flows — background that informs domain-driven design, correct business rules, and operational UX over pure technical novelty.
